'''karoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaddik|zaddik]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaddik|zaddik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| karoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæreteth|kæreteth]] || [[word:kæretej|kæretej]] || [[word:kæretesh|kæretesh]] || [[word:kærete|kærete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:karorototh|karorototh]] || [[word:karorotoj|karorotoj]] || [[word:karorotosh|karorotosh]] || [[word:karoroto|karoroto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:karototh|karototh]] || [[word:karotoj|karotoj]] || [[word:karotosh|karotosh]] || [[word:karoto|karoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:karoftoth|karoftoth]] || [[word:karoftoj|karoftoj]] || [[word:karoftosh|karoftosh]] || [[word:karoftof|karoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:karototho|karototho]] || [[word:karotojo|karotojo]] || [[word:karotosho|karotosho]] || [[word:karotoko|karotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:karototh|karototh]] || [[word:karotoj|karotoj]] || [[word:karotosh|karotosh]] || [[word:karoto|karoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:karotothol|karotothol]] || [[word:karotojol|karotojol]] || [[word:karotoshol|karotoshol]] || [[word:karotokol|karotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:karotothotho|karotothotho]] || [[word:karotojojo|karotojojo]] || [[word:karotoshosho|karotoshosho]] || [[word:karotoko|karotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:karotothon|karotothon]] || [[word:karotojon|karotojon]] || [[word:karotoshon|karotoshon]] || [[word:karotokon|karotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:karotothoro|karotothoro]] || [[word:karotojoro|karotojoro]] || [[word:karotoshoro|karotoshoro]] || [[word:karotokoro|karotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
